base_url.description: Google Fonts Developer API base URL. Defaults to the public googleapis.com endpoint, matching legacy's in-code default.

api_key.description: Google API key, sent as the `key` query parameter (legacy requires this secret; Read/Check hard-error when it is unset).

family.description: Optional passthrough filter: restrict results to a comma-separated list of font family names.

subset.description: Optional passthrough filter: restrict results to families supporting this comma-separated list of subsets.

category.description: Optional passthrough filter: restrict results to this comma-separated list of font categories (e.g. serif, sans-serif).

capability.description: Optional passthrough filter: restrict results to families supporting this comma-separated list of capabilities (e.g. WOFF2, VF).

alt.description: Optional passthrough: alternate response representation (API-standard `alt` query parameter, e.g. json).

pretty_print.description: Optional passthrough: API-standard `prettyPrint` query parameter (sent verbatim as prettyPrint).
